channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Philippine police file criminal complaints against Sara Duterte and her security aides
item.description: MANILA, Philippines (AP) — Philippine police officials on Wednesday filed criminal complaints against Vice President Sara Duterte and her security staff for allegedly assaulting authorities and disobeying orders in a recent altercation in Congress.
item.dc:creator: JIM GOMEZ, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Fugitive on FBI's 'Most Wanted Terrorist' list captured after more than 20 years on run
item.description: Daniel Andreas San Diego, a fugitive on the FBI’s “Most Wanted Terrorist” list, was captured in the United Kingdom on Monday after more than 20 years.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Expert approved gadgets for your gift giving
item.description: BestReviews is reader-supported and may earn an affiliate commission. Looking for some gifting inspiration? Jacob Palmer of BestReviews stopped by to show off some of their highly rated picks in various categories.
item.dc:creator: KTLA 5

item.title: Trump promised mass deportations. Educators worry fear will keep immigrants' kids from school
item.description: Last time Donald Trump was president, rumors of immigration raids terrorized the Oregon community where Gustavo Balderas was the school superintendent. Word spread that immigration agents were going to try to enter schools.
item.dc:creator: BIANCA VÁZQUEZ TONESS, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Court rejects request to sideline San Jose State volleyball player on grounds she’s transgender
item.description: A federal appeals court upheld a ruling Tuesday that allows a San Jose State women’s volleyball team member to play in this week’s Mountain West Conference tournament after a legal complaint said she should be ineligible on grounds that she is transgender and thus stronger, posing a safety risk to t
item.dc:creator: AMY BETH HANSON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Dog treats distributed to 19 states recalled for potential salmonella
item.description: A chicken-based dog treat sold online and in stores across 19 states has been recalled over the potential risk of salmonella.
item.dc:creator: Carlos Mathis, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Drought is causing saltwater to creep up the Delaware River. Here's what's being done about it
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (AP) — Salty oceanwater is creeping up the Delaware River, the source for much of the drinking water for Philadelphia and millions of others, brought on by drought conditions and sea level rise, and prompting officials to tap reservoirs to push the unpotable tide back downstream.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CATALINI and BRITTANY PETERSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump-backed Florida official resigns, announces run for Gaetz seat
item.description: Florida’s Chief Financial Officer Jimmy Patronis resigned from his position and announced his candidacy for former Rep. Matt Gaetz's (R-Fla.) seat in the 1st Congressional District on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, Fox 5

item.title: Elton John reveals that he has lost sight in one eye
item.description: Music legend Elton John says an infection he got earlier this year has left him without sight in one eye. The "Rocket Man" singer revealed in September that a severe eye infection had left him with "only limited vision in one eye.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KTLA 5

item.title: Virginia pilot, dog killed in New York plane crash; 2 other dogs found alive
item.description: A Virginia pilot and a rescue dog he was transporting were killed after a plane he was flying crashed in New York on Sunday, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Jenny Gable, NewsNation

item.title: Menendez brothers' resentencing request hearing pushed back to January
item.description: The Menendez brothers have waiting nearly three decades, and now they'll have to wait a little longer to hear their fates.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, ABC 4

item.title: SEC fines University of Oklahoma $200,000 after fans rush onto field
item.description: The University of Oklahoma was fined $200,000 after the fans rushed the field during Saturday's game against Alabama.
item.dc:creator: Dylan Brown / KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: The Onion's bid for Alex Jones' Infowars hangs in the balance as judge orders new hearing
item.description: A bankruptcy judge on Monday delayed a hearing in conspiracy theorist Alex Jones’ effort to stop the satirical news outlet The Onion from buying Infowars, keeping the auction sale up in the air for at least another few weeks.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Judge in LA delays until January decision on resentencing Menendez brothers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — A judge on Monday delayed until January his decision on whether to resentence Erik and Lyle Menendez for killing their parents in their Beverly Hills mansion 35 years ago, squashing their family’s hope the brothers would be released and home for the holidays.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Walmart ordered to pay former truck driver $35M after jury finds fraud claims false
item.description: A jury in California found Walmart defamed a truck driver with false claims of workers' compensation fraud and will have to pay the former worker more than $34 million in damages.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, Fox 5

item.title: Trump threatens sweeping new tariffs on Mexico, Canada & China on 1st day in office
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is threatening to impose sweeping new tariffs on Mexico, Canada and China as soon as he takes office as part of his efforts to crack down on illegal immigration and drugs.
item.dc:creator: JILL COLVIN Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: A voting machine firm suing Fox News now wants to probe Murdoch family trust fight
item.description: Lawyers for a voting machine company that’s suing Fox News want to question founder Rupert Murdoch about his contentious efforts to change his family trust, the attorneys told a court Monday.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Workers at Charlotte airport, an American Airlines hub, go on strike during Thanksgiving travel week
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Workers who clean airplanes, remove trash and help with wheelchairs at Charlotte's airport, one of the nation's busiest, went on strike Monday during a busy week of Thanksgiving travel to demand higher wages.
item.dc:creator: ERIK VERDUZCO and MAKIYA SEMINERA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Diddy uses Donald Trump's criminal case in bail argument
item.description: Combs’ lawyers said his pretrial speech should be evaluated based on the standard used in Trump's criminal case.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, Fox 5

item.title: Egyptian officials say 16 people are missing after a tourist yacht sank in high waves on the Red Sea
item.description: CAIRO (AP) — A tourist yacht sank in the Red Sea on Monday after warnings of rough waters and 16 people were missing, Egyptian officials said.
item.dc:creator: FATMA KHALED, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: MAP: Every state's favorite Thanksgiving side, according to Campbell's
item.description: The Thanksgiving turkey won’t be the star of the show in some households this holiday season, according to a recent study.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, WGN 9

item.title: Don't be 'that guy' at the TSA airport security checkpoint
item.description: While celebrating the holiday with family can bring its own stresses, nothing quite compares to the frenzy of the airport security checkpoint.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Photo said to show Amelia Earhart's plane is something else entirely, exploration company says
item.description: “After 11 months the waiting has finally ended and unfortunately our target was not Amelia's Electra 10E," the exploration company said.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WGN 9

item.title: What's behind the doors of this Missouri cave? A former roller rink, concert stage and more
item.description: Adventure awaits at every turn of one captivating cave in suburban St. Louis, now modernized into a quirky and nostalgic getaway with a storied legacy.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, Fox 5

item.title: Patrick Mahomes and Chiefs win at the buzzer again, topping Panthers 30-27 on Shrader's field goal
item.description: Ten yards into a scramble, Patrick Mahomes could have easily slid for a first down or simply ducked out of bounds and moved on to the next play.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Earth bids farewell to its temporary 'mini moon': What it was, and where it's going
item.description: Currently, more than 2 million miles away, the object is too small and faint to see without a powerful telescope.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: St. Louis Blues fire Drew Bannister and hire Jim Montgomery as coach
item.description: Drew Bannister is out as coach of the St. Louis Blues after less than a full calendar year on the job. Jim Montgomery is back behind the bench of an NHL team five days after he was fired by the Boston Bruins.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: You can get paid $2,500 to shop at Costco for a week
item.description: Attention Costco shoppers! How would you like to get paid $2,500 plus a free Costco membership to shop at your favorite store?
item.dc:creator: Jessica Yakubovsky, ABC 4

item.title: Chuck Woolery, former host of 'Wheel of Fortune' and more, dies
item.description: Chuck Woolery, the affable, smooth-talking game show host of “Wheel of Fortune,” “Love Connection” and “Scrabble” who later became a right-wing podcaster, skewering liberals and accusing the government of lying about COVID-19, has died.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Will a winter storm hit the US over Thanksgiving week? Here's what forecasts show so far
item.description: WINDSOR, Calif. (AP) — Forecasters warned over the weekend that another round of winter weather could complicate travel leading up to Thanksgiving in parts of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: GODOFREDO A. VASQUEZ and OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump taps Rollins as agriculture chief, completing proposed slate of Cabinet secretaries
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump said Saturday that he will nominate former White House aide Brooke Rollins to be his agriculture secretary, the last of his picks to lead executive agencies and another choice from within his established circle of advisers and allies.
item.dc:creator: BILL BARROW, ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON and ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Hyundai, Kia recall over 200K electric cars over power issues
item.description: Hyundai’s recall encompasses over 145,000 cars, including some IONIQ 5 and IONIQ 6 EVs along with Genesis GV60, Genesis GV70 and Genesis G80 models.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WGN 9

item.title: Here are the most heated Thanksgiving food fights
item.description: Thanksgiving dinner may be one of the most anticipated meals of the year for many people, but it is also one of the most debated. From the correct way to prepare the turkey to the best side dishes and desserts, here are the dishes worth fighting over this Thanksgiving.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Driver in crash that killed 4 kids was allegedly photographing ‘Welcome to Florida’ sign
item.description: A New York man was extradited to Florida this month after he was accused of causing a deadly crash when he came to a near-stop on Interstate 95 to take photo of the "Welcome to Florida" sign.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WGN 9

item.title: Texas approves optional Bible-based lessons for public schools
item.description: Texas gave final approval Friday to optional biblical lesson plans for kindergarten through 5th grade classes in state public schools.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump expected to name investor Scott Bessent as Treasury secretary pick
item.description: Bessent, founder and CEO of hedge fund Key Square Group, served as an economic adviser to the Trump campaign, often appearing on financial talk shows to argue in favor of the president-elect's economic policies.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Officer kills pet dog mistaken for a coyote in Massachusetts town. The owner says it was unnecessary
item.description: An animal control officer shot and killed a pet dog in a Massachusetts town after mistaking it for a coyote in an incident that has the animal's owner fuming, but that local police are describing as a sad mix-up.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, WGN 9
